MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is granted No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
